LAW AND MOTION 301, MAR-18-2026 RE: MOTION TO STAY PROCEEDINGS. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL, OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO STAY PROCEEDINGS IS GRANTED. SEE MINI MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING. A PROPOSED ORDER HAS BEEN SUBMITTED. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (301/HEK)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-21-2026 Continued To Dec-16-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STAY PROCEEDINGS
Off Calendar Mar-18-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO STAY PROCEEDINGS.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant City and County of San Francisco's motion to stay proceedings is granted. This case is stayed, including all discovery, until the resolution of the 36 related cases pending in the United States District Court for the Northern District of California or further order of this court. Good cause shown and no opposition filed.

A proposed order has been submitted.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (301/HEK)

Notice Of Defendant'S Motion To Stay Action
Off Calendar Feb-24-2026 Amended
